allow: PowerShell($body = '{"username":"admin","password":"DefCivil2026!"}'; $response = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/login" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json"; Write-Output "LOGIN OK - Rol: $\($response.rol\) - Nombre: $\($response.nombre\)")

PowerShell($body = '{"username":"admin","password":"DefCivil2026!"}'; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/login" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json"; $tok = $r.token; $r2 = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/ia_status" -Method GET -Headers @{"Authorization"="Bearer $tok"}; Write-Output "ia_configurada=$\($r2.ia_configurada\) | ia_disponible=$\($r2.ia_disponible\)")
